query:
ALTER TABLE product_master ADD COLUMN imageStatus enum('none','auto_fetched','confirmed','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'none' AFTER imageKey;
ALTER TABLE product_master ADD COLUMN imageSource varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL AFTER imageStatus;

ALTER TABLE product_master ADD COLUMN imageSource varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL AFTER imageStatus;
